implemented_behavior: Added build_client_run_order with fixed, interleaved, and seeded random policies.
Changed canonical CLI default from fixed order to interleaved order.
Persisted client_order_policy, client_order_seed, and client_order_position in result rows, raw headers, and environment JSON.
Added paired geomean ratios and log-ratio 95 percent confidence intervals.
canonical_ratio_rule: benchmark_comparison keeps throughput_rps_ratio_mean as diagnostic and uses paired_throughput_rps_ratio_geomean as the canonical throughput_rps_ratio when paired evidence exists.
